nasb.text: ‘For thus says the Lord God, “At the end of forty years I will gather the Egyptians from the peoples among whom they were scattered.

esv.text: “For thus says the Lord God: At the end of forty years I will gather the Egyptians from the peoples among whom they were scattered,

cnv.text: “‘主耶和華這樣說：滿了四十年，我必把埃及人從他們所分散到的萬族中招聚回來。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说，‘四十年之后，我要把分散的埃及人从各国聚集起来。
